title: Lead SEO Specialist at Shadowfax Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Lead SEO Specialist at Shadowfax Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Join the Shadowfax Asia Pacific Associates family as a SEO Specialist in Rajkot. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Shadowfax Asia Pacific Associates:
Shadowfax Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shadowfax Asia Pacific Associates!
